text: How is the painter attached to a lifeboat released once the boat is waterborne and ready to move away?

options.text: It must be cut with a hack-saw
Remove the toggle pin which will instantly release the painter eye
Unwind 50 meters of rope from the drum
It cannot be released and must be dragged along

explanation: The painter is attached using a slip-toggle or a quick-release mechanism that allows the crew to manually detach the painter instantly once the lifeboat is waterborne and clear of the ship's side.
